blocks.content: The food came and for a few minutes nobody said anything because Hester's burgers required actual attention.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: This is the best thing that has ever happened to me.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: You say that every time.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Because it's true every time.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: How can it be the best every time if there's a new best every time?

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Because I'm capable of appreciating the present moment, Kit. You should try it.
Daisy stole one of Eli's fries without asking.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Hey.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You have so many fries.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: That is not the point.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: It's a little the point.
Eli looked at Kit like he expected backup.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Don't look at me. I've learned not to get between Daisy and food.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: That's the smartest thing you've ever said.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Nine more days of this and then you're back to eating in the school cafeteria.
Something shifted in the booth. Not a big thing.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Nine days.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Don't say it like that.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Like what?

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Like it's something sad. Seventh grade's going to be great.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: How do you know?

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Because I've decided it will be. That's how things work.
